childhood.familyBackground: Born 1964. Daughter of Dan Duncan, co-founder of Enterprise Products Partners. Family controls one-third of Enterprise.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1964년생. Enterprise Products Partners 공동창립자 댄 던컨의 딸. 가족은 Enterprise의 1/3을 통제함.
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in oil and energy industry family. Father founded Enterprise Products in 1968 with $10,000 and two fuel trucks.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 석유 및 에너지 산업 가족에서 성장. 아버지는 1968년 10,000달러와 2대의 연료 트럭으로 Enterprise Products 설립.

careerTimeline.event: Father Dan Duncan co-founded Enterprise Products as natural gas liquids wholesaler
careerTimeline.eventKo: 아버지 댄 던컨이 천연가스 액화물 도매업체로 Enterprise Products 공동창립

careerTimeline.event: Inherited $3.1 billion upon father's death, benefiting from estate tax law repeal
careerTimeline.eventKo: 아버지 사망 시 31억 달러 상속, 재산세법 폐지 혜택 받음

careerTimeline.event: Manages inherited stake worth estimated $9.2 billion in Enterprise Products
careerTimeline.eventKo: Enterprise Products의 상속 지분 약 92억 달러 규모 관리

personalTraits.knownFor: Energy industry heir, management of massive energy infrastructure portfolio
personalTraits.knownForKo: 에너지 산업 상속인, 대규모 에너지 인프라 포트폴리오 관리
